# GitHub issues and backlog

The previous single-file backlog was split into maintainable pieces.

| Resource | Purpose |
| -------- | ------- |
| [Issue templates](./ISSUE_TEMPLATE/) | **Issues → New issue** — Bug, Feature, Frontend task, Design proposal |
| [Backlog index](./backlog/README.md) | Project scope, design standards, and rebuild context |
| [Backlog items](./backlog/) | One Markdown file per work item (`001-*.md` … `050-*.md`) with YAML frontmatter |
| [Post-audit queue](./audit-issues/) | 30 **engineering / platform** issues (auth, CI, performance, docs) with copy-paste bodies |

Create labels in the repository to match suggested labels in backlog and audit files (for example `frontend`, `priority-high`, `dashboard`).
